case_title: POINT BREEZE CREDIT UNION vs. FORBES, ERIC CHRISTIAN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POINT BREEZE CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT FORBES, ERIC CHRISTIAN RAEMER, JR., CHRISTIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-04-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-03-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-18-2000
